title: episcia glabra
intro: Episcia glabra, also known as the Brazilian tear plant or Episcia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Episcia glabra include its ability to calm digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural pain reliever. Episcia glabra can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
